title: Border Hoarder
description: Objective is to collect every item in the game. Each new item expands the world border. Collect as many as you can. Multiplayer is fully supported whether you play with or against your friends.
body:
### Description
Border Hoarder is a data pack in which the goal is to find every item in the game. The catch is that the world border starts out at 1 block wide. Each new item you find expands the world border. 
### Helpful info
- Supports any number of players 
- /trigger lobby has a chest with all the items left to discover. (unlocks after 10 items)
### Shoutout
This project takes inspiration from SimonDMC who made a minecraft map with this concept.
### Extra info about the project
This is my first data pack, while I had lots of experience with minecraft commands and programing I've never made a data pack before. Initially I just wanted to take SimonDMC's data pack from their map and update it to support 1.21.11. However, I quickly found out that wouldn't really be possible and had to start from scratch. Their data pack was heavily tied to their specific map and only supported 16 players (because they were using a fixed amount of barrels to store inventories when players entered their version of the lobby). Overall I am happy with how this data pack turned out and I hope you can enjoy playing it as much as I do.
